instruction:
Repair the station locally: clock-hour is missing, clock-minute was duplicated, poster-blue shifted right, and platform-crack has the wrong path. Change only those parts.

Patch:
- platform-crack.d: "M18 112 C32 116 42 103 56 112 S82 114 96 108" -> "M18 108 C32 104 42 111 56 108 S82 106 96 110"
- poster-blue.x: 185 -> 178
- remove clock-minute-dup
- add clock-hour: <line id="clock-hour" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x1="196" y1="31" x2="196" y2="23" />
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 220 140" width="220" height="140">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="140" fill="#faf8ff" />
  <rect id="sky-band" fill="#ede9fe" x="0" y="0" width="220" height="64" />
  <path id="overhead-wire" fill="none" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" d="M8 18 C42 10 74 10 108 18 S176 26 212 18" />
  <rect id="station-wall" fill="#ffe4e6" x="0" y="64" width="220" height="30" />
  <rect id="platform" fill="#d8b4fe" x="0" y="94" width="220" height="46" />
  <rect id="platform-edge" fill="#f9a8d4" x="0" y="94" width="220" height="5" />
  <path id="platform-crack" fill="none" stroke="#94a3b8" stroke-width="1" d="M18 112 C32 116 42 103 56 112 S82 114 96 108" />
  <line id="rail-back" stroke="#64748b" stroke-width="3" x1="0" y1="118" x2="220" y2="118" />
  <line id="rail-front" stroke="#475569" stroke-width="3" x1="0" y1="130" x2="220" y2="130" />
  <rect id="track-tie-1" fill="#7c2d12" x="18" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-2" fill="#7c2d12" x="56" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-3" fill="#7c2d12" x="94" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-4" fill="#7c2d12" x="132" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="track-tie-5" fill="#7c2d12" x="170" y="116" width="7" height="18" />
  <rect id="train-body" fill="#f43f5e" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" x="26" y="38" width="126" height="46" rx="6" ry="6" />
  <rect id="train-roof" fill="#be123c" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="34" y="30" width="110" height="12" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <rect id="window-left" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="38" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="window-center" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="68" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="window-right" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="98" y="46" width="24" height="16" />
  <rect id="train-door" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="128" y="44" width="16" height="34" />
  <circle id="door-handle" fill="#222" cx="140" cy="61" r="1.6" />
  <circle id="wheel-left" fill="#111827" cx="48" cy="86" r="6" />
  <circle id="wheel-right" fill="#111827" cx="126" cy="86" r="6" />
  <line id="signal-post" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="4" x1="170" y1="32" x2="170" y2="94" />
  <rect id="signal-box" fill="#111827" x="162" y="22" width="16" height="34" rx="3" ry="3" />
  <circle id="signal-red" fill="#ef4444" cx="170" cy="30" r="3" />
  <circle id="signal-amber" fill="#f59e0b" cx="170" cy="39" r="3" />
  <circle id="signal-green" fill="#22c55e" cx="170" cy="48" r="3" />
  <circle id="clock-face" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1.5" cx="196" cy="31" r="12" />
  <line id="clock-minute" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x1="196" y1="31" x2="203" y2="31" />
  <rect id="poster-blue" fill="#7c3aed" stroke="#222" stroke-width="0.8" x="185" y="62" width="14" height="20" />

  <rect id="variant-03-chip-05" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.68" x="147" y="5" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-06" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.68" x="178" y="6" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-07" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.68" x="11" y="141" width="7" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-08" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.68" x="42" y="140" width="8" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-09" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.68" x="79" y="139" width="9" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-10" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.68" x="110" y="141" width="7" height="4" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-11" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.68" x="147" y="140" width="8" height="3" rx="1" />
  <rect id="variant-03-chip-12" fill="#f59e0b" opacity="0.68" x="178" y="139" width="9" height="4" rx="1" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-01" fill="#06b6d4" opacity="0.66" cx="29" cy="25" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-02" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.66" cx="190" cy="39" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-03" fill="#6366f1" opacity="0.66" cx="15" cy="53" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-04" fill="#8b5cf6" opacity="0.66" cx="200" cy="67" r="2.3" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-05" fill="#d946ef" opacity="0.66" cx="25" cy="81" r="2.55" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-06" fill="#ec4899" opacity="0.66" cx="210" cy="95" r="1.8" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-07" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.66" cx="11" cy="109" r="2.05" />
  <circle id="variant-03-pin-08" fill="#f97316" opacity="0.66" cx="196" cy="123" r="2.3" />
  <line id="clock-minute-dup" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x1="191" y1="38" x2="198" y2="38" />
</svg>
